channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals
channel.description: Curated intelligence feed from Delta V

item.title: This is what security at protocol scale looks like: coverage that expands automatically as new vaults launch, and a response path that does not depend on someone being awake, online, and fast enough.
item.description: pThis is what security at protocol scale looks like: coverage that expands automatically as new vaults launch, and a response path that does not depend on someone being awake, online, and fast enough.br /br /Great work by the Accountable team building the wiring from detection to action!/phr /blockq

item.title: RT by @glassnode: What's up with runes? Roughly 2 in 3 #Bitcoin transactions have been runestones, above 70% on many days. They’re not just filling blockspace either: lately runestones accounted for u
item.description: pWhat's up with runes?br /br /Roughly 2 in 3 a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23Bitcoin"#Bitcoin/a transactions have been runestones, above 70% on many days.br /br /They’re not just filling blockspace either: lately runestones accounted for up to ~25% of daily a href="https://nitter

item.title: Google Is Suing Chinese Scammers Who Are Using Gemini
item.description: pNot sure a href="https://arstechnica.com/google/2026/06/google-sues-chinese-cybercrime-network-that-used-gemini-to-automate-scams/"this/a will have any effect, but I support the effort:/pblockquotepAccording to Google&#8217;s legal filing, Outsider Enterprise operates through Telegram. The group of

item.title: RT by @Dinosn: A stored XPATH injection vulnerability exists in opnsense's trust module. Any user if given just System: CA Manager permissions can use a bool side channel/oracle to slowly leak any sec
item.description: pA stored XPATH injection vulnerability exists in opnsense's trust module.br /br /Any user if given just System: br /CA Manager permissions can use a bool side channel/oracle to slowly leak any secret in config.xml character by character. the injection point is in the refid field of a ca object.br /

item.title: A conceptor by any other name
item.description: pspanI just had one of those delightful moments where I have a very specific idea, and then I search for it (Claude Research in this case), and it turns out that people have already been using that /spanbspanexact/span/bspan concept but just calling it by a name I'd never heard of./span/ppspanThat n

item.title: Four Bitcoin Bottoms, One Signal: the 100-Day NUPL Below Zero “Either the 100-day EMA crosses zero as it did at every prior bottom, or this becomes the first cycle to bottom without it, which would fi
item.description: pFour Bitcoin Bottoms, One Signal: the 100-Day NUPL Below Zerobr /br /“Either the 100-day EMA crosses zero as it did at every prior bottom, or this becomes the first cycle to bottom without it, which would fit the shallower-each-time trend.” – By a href="https://nitter.net/thechessONCHAIN" title="ch

item.title: Bots constantly flooding with malware on GitHub, same stars count on the new repositories, and GitHub's process is too slow / time consuming to report all.

Features deep PE parsing, YARA scanning, and heuristic risk scoring. a href="https://github.com/Rhacknarok/hacksguard"github.com/Rhacknarok/hacksg…/a/phr /bLink/bbr /a href="https://github.com/Rhacknarok/hacksguard"img src="h

item.title: A complete bug bounty workspace for HackerOne researchers. Includes scope enforcement, automated recon/vuln pipeline (400+ tools), report templates, CVE/CWE watchlists, and a local VM practice lab. Bu
item.description: pA complete bug bounty workspace for HackerOne researchers. Includes scope enforcement, automated recon/vuln pipeline (400+ tools), report templates, CVE/CWE watchlists, and a local VM practice lab. Built for disciplined, ethical hunting. a href="https://github.com/DevCop95/bugbounty-lab101"github.c

item.title: MiCA. DORA. Evolving regulator expectations across major markets. They're all converging on the same baseline: continuous monitoring, real-time risk controls, demonstrable audit trails. Institutions b
item.description: pMiCA. DORA. Evolving regulator expectations across major markets.br /br /They're all converging on the same baseline: continuous monitoring, real-time risk controls, demonstrable audit trails.br /br /Institutions building this into their infrastructure now won't have to rebuild from scratch when th

item.title: Someone opened a 10x short on 3,753.56 $SNDK ($6.27M) on @Aster_DEX and is now up $116K (+18.53%). https://www.asterdex.com/en/explorer/address/0xb84BEBA977D309eC9D44ac45e78817Ca009ef890
